metadata.description: Marketplace for the p2e Claude Code plugin — shared workflow parity backed by the P2E MCP.

plugins.name: p2e
plugins.description: Adds /p2e-bootstrap, /p2e-add-story, /p2e-update-story, /p2e-work-on-next, /p2e-sync-labels, and the p2e-architect / p2e-staff-engineer agents. Backed by the P2E MCP server (configurable via P2E_MCP_URL).
